title: tetradenia baueri
intro: Tetradenia baueri, also known as African tea tree, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its woody stem and fragrant leaves. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tetradenia baueri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Tetradenia baueri can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
